---
name: Task / Research
about: General work that is neither a new feature nor a bug fix — e.g., investigation, research, chore, refactor, documentation, build/CI, performance.
title: "[Task] "
labels: ["task"]
assignees: []
---

## Target Branch
- [x] Main
- [ ] Develop

## Priority
- [ ] P0 (Critical - blocking other work)
- [ ] P1 (High)
- [ ] P2 (Normal)

## Owner
- Responsible person: @

## Type
- [ ] Research / Investigation (e.g., "evaluate GUI library options")
- [ ] Chore (build, tooling, dependency, configuration)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Style / formatting
- [ ] Test infrastructure

## What (Scope)
-

## Why (Reason / Context)
-

## Deliverable / Definition of Done
> What artifact does this task produce? Examples:
> - A short decision document under `docs/design/`
> - A merged code change with no functional impact (refactor)
> - A new or updated document under `docs/`
> - A configured workflow / pipeline file
-

- [ ]
- [ ]

- [ ] conf
- [ ] data
- [ ] gui
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] record
- [ ] tests
- [ ] CI Pipeline

## Investigation Notes / Findings
> For Research / Investigation tasks, summarise the question, the options considered, and the recommendation here. Link any reference material used.
-

## Progress
- [ ] Scope agreed
- [ ] Investigation / implementation in progress
- [ ] Review (PR review or team decision sign-off)
- [ ] Verified / merged / decision recorded
